channel.title: Skotte Analytics Blog
channel.description: AI, automation, and optimization insights for business owners

item.title: How Small Businesses Are Using AI in 2026
item.description: AI isn't just for big tech anymore. Here's how small businesses are using AI in 2026 to automate customer service, generate content, optimize operations, and make better decisions.

item.title: 5 Business Processes You Should Automate Today
item.description: If you're doing it manually every week, it should be automated. Here are the five business processes where automation delivers the biggest ROI.

item.title: What Does an AI Consultant Actually Do?
item.description: AI consultant sounds vague. Here's what it actually means — from discovery to deployment — and when your business is ready to hire one.
